query:
SELECT l.person_id, l.distinct_id, l.version
                    FROM UNNEST($2::bigint[]) AS pid(id)
                    CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
                        SELECT person_id, distinct_id, version
                        FROM posthog_persondistinctid
                        WHERE team_id = $1 AND person_id = pid.id
                        LIMIT $3
                    ) l
